rules: Sports shoes are mandatory. No slippers, heels, or spikes allowed on the turf.
No smoking, alcohol, or tobacco products inside the venue premises.
Outside food and beverages are not permitted inside the playing area.
Advance booking is required for all sessions.
Full payment or minimum 50% advance is required to confirm a slot.
Players must arrive 10 minutes before the slot time. Late arrivals will not get extra time.
Maximum 12 players allowed per session unless booked as a tournament package.
Respect the turf — avoid dragging feet, and do not use metal-spiked shoes.
Any damage to equipment or facilities will be charged to the booking party.
The venue reserves the right to cancel a booking in case of emergency (full refund given).
Children under 10 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
No foul language or unsportsmanlike behavior will be tolerated.
Floodlights are included in all bookings after 6 PM.
Changing rooms must be kept clean and tidy after use.
In case of bad weather, management will reschedule or refund the booking.
